description: Latitude of grid cell center (WGS84)
context: 0.5-degree resolution grid covering CONUS

description: Longitude of grid cell center (WGS84)
context: 0.5-degree resolution grid covering CONUS

description: ISO calendar year of the observation week
context: Data spans 2001-2020

description: ISO calendar week number (1-53)
context: Filtered to fire season weeks (April-October, approx weeks 14-44)

description: Weekly mean of daily maximum temperature (degrees C)
source: CPC Global Unified Temperature via ComExDBM 01_HeatWave
context: Aggregated as weekly mean of daily values

description: Weekly mean of daily minimum temperature (degrees C)
source: CPC Global Unified Temperature via ComExDBM 01_HeatWave
context: Aggregated as weekly mean of daily values

description: Weekly mean of daily mean temperature (degrees C)
source: CPC Global Unified Temperature via ComExDBM 01_HeatWave
context: Aggregated as weekly mean of daily values

description: Heatwave indicator: 1 if any day in the week had tmean exceeding the 95th percentile for 3+ consecutive days
context: Primary heatwave definition used for compound event labeling. Weekly max aggregation.

description: Heatwave indicator: 1 if any day in the week had tmax exceeding the 95th percentile for 3+ consecutive days
context: Secondary heatwave definition based on maximum temperature. Weekly max aggregation.

description: Weekly total count of highest-confidence (level 9) fire hotspot pixels (1km) within the 0.5-degree grid cell
context: Aggregated as weekly sum. Zero means no fire detected.

description: Weekly mean of daily maximum fire radiative power (MW) at highest confidence level
context: Aggregated as weekly mean. Measures fire intensity.

description: Weekly total fire burned area in square kilometers within the grid cell
source: MODIS MCD64A1 via FIRED algorithm, ComExDBM 02_FireData
context: Aggregated as weekly sum.

description: Weekly mean Palmer Drought Severity Index (-5 extreme drought to +5 extreme wet)
context: Aggregated as weekly mean. Negative values indicate drought.

description: Most frequent PDSI drought category during the week (0=extreme drought to 10=extreme wet, 5=near normal)
context: Categories: 0=extreme drought, 1=severe, 2=moderate, 3=mild drought, 4=incipient dry, 5=near normal, 6-10=wet categories

description: Weekly mean Standardized Precipitation Index at 90-day timescale
context: Aggregated as weekly mean. Negative values indicate below-normal precipitation.

description: Weekly mean Standardized Precipitation-Evapotranspiration Index at 90-day timescale
context: Aggregated as weekly mean. Accounts for both precipitation and evapotranspiration.

description: Weekly mean daily surface air temperature (K)
context: Aggregated as weekly mean. From NCEP North American Regional Reanalysis.

description: Weekly mean daily accumulated precipitation (kg/m^2)
context: Aggregated as weekly mean of daily 3-hour accumulated values.

description: Weekly mean soil moisture (kg/m^2)
context: Aggregated as weekly mean.

description: Weekly mean latent heat flux (W/m^2)
context: Aggregated as weekly mean.

description: Weekly mean sensible heat flux (W/m^2)
context: Aggregated as weekly mean.

description: Weekly mean relative humidity at 2 meters (%)
context: Aggregated as weekly mean.

description: Weekly mean black carbon + organic carbon aerosol concentration
context: Aggregated as weekly mean. Indicator of biomass burning aerosols.

description: Weekly mean Leaf Area Index (m^2/m^2)
context: Aggregated as weekly mean. Vegetation density indicator.

description: Weekly mean Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (-1 to 1)
context: Aggregated as weekly mean. Vegetation health indicator.

description: Weekly mean Fire Weather Index
context: Aggregated as weekly mean. Higher values indicate greater fire risk.

description: Binary: 1 if heatwave (HI02=1) AND drought (pdsi_category <= 3, mild drought or worse) co-occurred during the week
context: Core compound event label. Weekly max of daily compound indicator.

description: Binary: 1 if fire activity (FHS_c9 > 0) occurred during compound heatwave+drought conditions in the week
context: Triple-compound event: wildfire during heatwave+drought. Weekly max.

description: Weekly mean surface wind speed (m/s), derived from U and V wind components at 1000 hPa
context: Known wildfire driver. Aggregated as weekly mean.

description: Sine component of cyclical day-of-year encoding: sin(2*pi*DOY/365)
context: Captures seasonal patterns without discontinuity at year boundary. End-of-week value.

description: Cosine component of cyclical day-of-year encoding: cos(2*pi*DOY/365)
context: Captures seasonal patterns without discontinuity at year boundary. End-of-week value.

description: 7-day rolling average of daily mean temperature at end of week (degrees C)
source: Engineered: 7-day rolling mean of tmean per grid cell
context: Captures recent warming trend. End-of-week value.

description: 14-day change in PDSI (current minus 14 days ago). Negative = worsening drought.
source: Engineered: pdsi difference over 14-day lag per grid cell
context: Captures whether drought is worsening or improving. End-of-week value.

description: Maximum Fire Weather Index over the preceding 7 days at end of week
source: Engineered: 7-day rolling max of FWI per grid cell
context: Captures persistence of fire-favorable conditions. End-of-week value.

description: Forecast target: compound_hw_drought value for the NEXT week (1-week lead)
source: Engineered: 1-week forward shift of compound_hw_drought per grid cell
context: Primary forecast target for 1-week ahead prediction.

description: Forecast target: compound_hw_drought value 2 weeks ahead (2-week lead)
source: Engineered: 2-week forward shift of compound_hw_drought per grid cell
context: Secondary forecast target for 2-week ahead prediction.
